creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I checked the error log files and we have up to 5 clicks a day  
for /FAQ/* . I can live with this number, we have up to 16,000 HTTP 404 errors 
on www.freebsd.org. Google is clever enough to find the correct URL for 
the FreeBSD FAQ.
